# SupperTable Brand Assets

This folder contains the SupperTable logo source and generated browser/device icon package.

## Source files

- `suppertable-icon.svg` - compact mark for favicon and app icons
- `suppertable-logo-horizontal.svg` - horizontal logo lockup

## Generated files

- `favicon-16x16.png`
- `favicon-32x32.png`
- `favicon-48x48.png`
- `icon-72x72.png`
- `icon-96x96.png`
- `icon-128x128.png`
- `icon-144x144.png`
- `icon-150x150.png`
- `icon-152x152.png`
- `icon-167x167.png`
- `apple-touch-icon.png`
- `android-chrome-192x192.png`
- `android-chrome-384x384.png`
- `android-chrome-512x512.png`
- `maskable-icon-512x512.png`
- `suppertable-social-card.png`

The root `favicon.ico` and `site.webmanifest` reference this package.
